system.translate_notice:
Quick question! Your Discord isn't set to English! okabot supports real-time automatic translations for some features, and it's available in your language! These are machine-translated, and may not be 100% accurate. Do you want to allow okabot to translate these compatible features for you?
-# Want to help supply official translations? Contact okawaffles! They are always welcome!
system.translate_yes_final: Got it, I'll translate commands for you automatically!
system.translate_no_final: Got it, I'll just use the default English translations for you!

rules.title: okabot Rules
rules.desc: You must read and agree to these rules before using okabot (updated {{version}}). If this is suddenly appearing again, the rules have updated and you must agree to the new rules.

name.five: 5. No public discussion of achievement solutions

value.one: Any abuse of bugs or manipulation will cause your account to be irreversibly **reset without warning**. Alongside, you may potentially be banned from using okabot entirely.
value.two: Effortless gambling isn't fair to others. Don't use macros/scripts.
value.three: You are allowed one account and one account only for okabot.
value.four: You are prohibited from trading okash/items for real-world currencies or items in any other bot. Trading okash to trade items is OK.
value.five: I can't control what you do in your private chats, but please don't discuss achievement solutions publicly, that ruins the fun of figuring them out yourself!
value.disclaimer: By using okabot, you are consenting to having select data collected about you/your usage of okabot. This information may be linked to your Discord user ID or other identifying information. This information is not, and never will be, shared with third-parties. If this is not your first time using okabot, and you wish to have all data pertaining to your account deleted, please DM okabot "data deletion request" and the rest of the process can be handled from there.

rules.privacy: You can read about okabot's privacy policy at https://oka.bot/privacy
rules.agreed: You agreed to the rules! Thank you for using okabot! Have fun!
rules.agreed_text:
**{{name}}**, you've agreed to the rules! Have fun with okabot!
You can run this command again at any time to see the rules.
rules.already_agreed: You've already agreed to the okabot rules! Thanks!

command.rate_limit: :hourglass: Slow down, **{{name}}**! You *just* ran this command!
command.disabled: :x: This feature isn't available in this server. Maybe ask a server admin to enable it?

language.eng_only: Sorry, this feature is only available when your okabot language is set to English!

interactions.okash:
{{cat_money}} **{{name}}**, you've got {{okash}} OKA**{{wallet}}** in your wallet.
Your bank balance is {{okash}} OKA**{{bank}}**.
There's currently {{okash}} OKA**{{fines}}** in the bank's fines.

daily.init: {{cat_sunglasses}} You got your daily reward of {{okash}} OKA**1500** and a **{{coin}}**!
daily.streak: :chart_with_upwards_trend: Wow! You've got a streak of {{length}} days, keep it up! You get a streak bonus of {{okash}} OKA**{{bonus}}**! **(+{{xp}}XP)**
daily.got_shard: :scream_cat: Woah! You also got a rare 1x {{token}} **Black Market Token Shard**!
daily.too_early:
:crying_cat_face: It's too early to get your daily reward, **{{name}}**! Come back <t:{{time}}:R> to claim it!
Your current daily streak is {{days}} day(s).

reminder.now: :clock3: {{ping}}, you can now claim your daily reward! Come get it!
reminder.scheduled: {{cat_sunglasses}} Got it, I'll ping you here when your daily reward is ready to claim!
reminder.not_premium: :crying_cat_face: Sorry, **{{name}}**, but you need to either be in a Premium-enabled server or have donated to okabot to use a reminder for more than 6 hours...
reminder.already_scheduled: :pouting_cat: **{{name}}**, I already told you that I'd remind you!!

toggle.on_pronouns_set: {{cat_sunglasses}} Okaaaay, I'll refer to you by {{pronouns}} from now on!
toggle.on_lang_set: {{cat_sunglasses}} Got it, I'll use this language from now on!
toggle.on_lang_set_follow:
{{cat_sunglasses}} Got it, I'll use whatever language your Discord is set to!
-# Not all translations will be accurate in machine-translated languages.

errors.paid_okabot: :bangbang: **{{user}}**... I'm flattered, but I don't accept payments...
errors.paid_bot: :rotating_light: **{{user}}**, what do you think you're doing?!
errors.paid_banned: :x: **{{user}}**, failed to transfer okash to this person.
errors.paid_too_much: :crying_cat_face: **{{user}}**, you don't have that much okash available!

pay.success: :handshake: **{{user}}** paid **{{receiver}}** {{okash}} OKA**{{amount}}**! You should say thanks!

items.title: Items in your pockets
items.nothing: :crying_cat_face: **{{name}}**, you have nothing in your pockets!

tracked.title: Your Tracked:tm: Customizations
tracked.nothing: :crying_cat_face: **{{name}}**, you haven't crafted any Tracked:tm: items yet!

danbooru.search_display:
Most recent {{num}} post(s) for your search. Lower quality is chosen to prevent oversize.
IDs: {{ids}}
danbooru.no_posts:
No posts for tag list, are your tags correct? Tags example: `nia_(xenoblade) open_mouth rating:g`
(note: tags such as `rating:g` *do not* count towards the two-tag limit!)

level.levelup:
Heck yea, **{{name}}**! You've leveled up to **{{level_name}}** ({{level}})!
You got {{okash}} OKA**{{amount}}** and 1x **{{lootbox}}**!
Your next level will be in **{{xp}}XP**.
level.xp_gain: XP Gain is limited to between 3-10xp for each message, with a cooldown of 30s.
level.xp_modernization: Heads up! Your level has been changed to reflect the new XP calculation. Therefore, your level will be lower than it was previously.

custom_link.needs_ublb: :crying_cat_face: Sorry, but you need to buy {{ublb}} before you can use this!

missing.name: Unknown Item
missing.desc: I dunno what this item is! (This is a bug, please report it!)

sr.name: Streak Restore
sr.desc: Restores your streak if you miss a day.
sr.on_use: {{sr}} **{{name}}**, you've restored your daily reward streak to **{{length}} days**!
sr.on_use_fail: **{{name}}**, looks like your streak is already higher than your previous one, so you can't restore your streak!

wc.name: {{weighted_coin}} Weighted Coin
wc.desc: Increases your chances of winning a coinflip.

common.name: :package: Common Lootbox
common.desc: An old cardboard box containing some common items.

rare.name: :package: Common Lootbox
rare.desc: Not too shabby... A wooden box with a few rare items in it.

ex.name: :package: EX Lootbox
ex.desc: Woah, it's so sparkly! A metal box with a bunch of super rare items in it!

td.name: Tracking Device
td.desc: A kit that turns a customization into a Tracked:tm: customization. This makes the item unique and tracks a specific statistic. I hear it's pretty popular amongst Spotify users.

sv.name: Shop Voucher
sv.desc: A voucher that can be redeemed for a free customization (with some exceptions)

st.name: Scratch Ticket
st.desc: Test your luck with this scratch card and have a chance at winning a load of okash!

db15.name: Drop Boost (15 min)
db15.desc: Mysteriously, using this item seems to increase your luck at finding lootboxes.

db30.name: Drop Boost (30 min)
db30.desc: Mysteriously, using this item seems to increase your luck at finding lootboxes.

cas10.name: :credit_card: Casino Pass (10 min)
cas10.desc: Skip the queue and bypass any cooldowns while you've got this active! (shorthand: cas10)

cas30.name: :credit_card: Casino Pass (30 min)
cas30.desc: Skip the queue and bypass any cooldowns while you've got this active! (shorthand: cas30)

cas60.name: :credit_card: Casino Pass (60 min)
cas60.desc: Skip the queue and bypass any cooldowns while you've got this active! (shorthand: cas60)

sk.name: :crystal_ball: Sticker Kit
sk.desc: Profile banner looking a bit boring? Slap a sticker on it, make it unique, make it *yours*!

bmt.name: {{bmt}} Black Market Token
bmt.desc: It's said this token can be used to buy legally-questionable items. I wouldn't know, though. I'm a good boy.

bmts.name: {{bmts}} Black Market Token Shard
bmts.desc: Long ago, when the police destroyed all the **Black Market Tokens**, they sprinkled the shards throughout the land. Seems like about 25 would be enough to make a token.

brt.name: Bank Robbery Tool
brt.desc: Did your victim move all their cash to their bank account? Use this totally illegal bank robbery tool to steal a chunk of okash from them!

missing.name: Unknown Item
missing.desc: I dunno what this item is! (This is a bug, please report it!)

tracked.name: **Tracked:tm: {{item}}**
tracked.coin: This item is unique. It counts how many times it's been flipped. Serial no: **`{{serial}}`**. It's been flipped {{flips}} time(s).
tracked.deck: This item is unique. It counts how many cards it has dealt. Serial no: **`{{serial}}`**. It's dealt {{cards}} card(s).

ublb.name: User Banner Level Background
ublb.desc: Allows you to show off your Discord profile banner in /profile level!

dc.name: {{default_coin}} Default Coin
dc.desc: The definitely-not-biased classic yellow coin everyone has. You're still convinced it's biased.

rc.name: {{red_coin}} Red Coin
rc.desc: Red, like strawberries! This coin makes you feel like you can do anything, even climbing a mountain!

dbc.name: {{dark_blue_coin}} Dark Blue Coin
dbc.desc: This coin has a deep color resembling the ocean. Hopefully it can make your pockets just as deep.

lbc.name: {{light_blue_coin}} Light Blue Coin
lbc.desc: Even the sky struggles to reach this shade of blue. Just like you're struggling to win your flips.

pc.name: {{pink_coin}} Pink Coin
pc.desc: "Pink is for girls"? I'll do you one better: Pink is for rich people. Beat that.

ppc.name: {{purple_coin}} Purple Coin
ppc.desc: A purple coin. It's the slightly-less-rich man's pink coin, but you don't care, because it still looks cool anyway.

dgc.name: {{dark_green_coin}} Dark Green Coin
dgc.desc: A dark green coin. Even though it's not weighted, you still feel luckier using it.

rbc.name: {{rainbow_coin}} Rainbow Coin
rbc.desc: This mythical coin, said to be gifted from the gods, is almost useless, but looks extremely cool.

rlb.name: Red Level Bar
rlb.desc: Sets your level bar's color to red.

glb.name: Green Level Bar
glb.desc: Sets your level bar's color to green.

blb.name: Blue Level Bar
blb.desc: Sets your level bar's color to blue.

plb.name: Pink Level Bar
plb.desc: Sets your level bar's color to pink.

dcd.name: {{dcd_back}} Default Card Deck
dcd.desc: The classic card deck. It's not unique in terms of design, but it gets the job done.

tcd.name: {{tcd_back}} Trans Card Deck
tcd.desc: A card deck that's a little bit different, but being different is okay!

cbcd.name: {{cbcd_back}} Cherry Blossom Card Deck
cbcd.desc: A card deck with some pretty sakura flowers and pink numbers on it.

achievements.title: Achievements

usewc.name: Backup Plan
usewc.desc: The dealer can't win if the odds are in my favor!
usewc.title: casino cheater

get21.name: Blackjack!
get21.desc: Not to be confused with Jack Black.
get21.title: perfectionist

land36.name: I Just Knew
land36.desc: It's bound to happen at some point.
land36.title: fortune teller

capitalism.name: Capitalism at its Finest
capitalism.desc: Now most of the world hates you.
capitalism.title: filthy capitalist

gamble_gobroke.name: Gamble Irresponsibly
gamble_gobroke.desc: Yikes, hope you aren't in debt...
gamble_gobroke.title: irresponsible gambler

maxbetwin.name: High Risk, High Reward
maxbetwin.desc: At some point, money becomes useless.
maxbetwin.title: risk taker

restorestreak.name: Deciduous Arborist
restorestreak.desc: We're all a little forgetful sometimes.
restorestreak.title: a little forgetful

robmin25000.name: Wallet Weight Loss
robmin25000.desc: You plan on giving it back... right?
robmin25000.title: kleptomaniac

robfined.name: Uhhh... Oops?
robfined.desc: Let's just pretend this never happened...
robfined.title: convicted criminal

okabotcry.name: Naughty List
okabotcry.desc: Trying your best sometimes isn't good enough.
okabotcry.title: hated by okabot

okashdrop.name: What's This?
okashdrop.desc: No, you can't be a good samaritan and turn it in.
okashdrop.title: finders keepers

notadmin.name: Get Outta Here!
notadmin.desc: After I spent half an hour on my hair?!
notadmin.title: fake moderator

voicemin300xp.name: Talkative
voicemin300xp.desc: Earn at least 300 XP from VC XP rewards
voicemin300xp.title: talkative

remindmetwice.name: I Get It!
remindmetwice.desc: One can never be too sure.
remindmetwice.title: annoying

quickclaim.name: Quick Draw
quickclaim.desc: Do you even do anything outside?
quickclaim.title: never late

bankdep.name: A Visit From the IRS
bankdep.desc: These auditors do NOT play around.
bankdep.title: tax evader

robchain.name: Convoluted Indirect Deposit
robchain.desc: This doesn't make you innocent, now.
robchain.title: black market proxy

sticker.name: Adhesive
sticker.desc: What are these things made of?!
sticker.title: customization enjoyer

dealt21both.name: Competitive Teamwork
dealt21both.desc: It's amazing what we can do when we work together!
dealt21both.title: card magician

levelbar.name: Useless Exchange
levelbar.desc: We are back to where we started... which was right here.
levelbar.title: experimenter

uselessrobbery.name: Dealer's Intervention
uselessrobbery.desc: Well, that's one way to get your fix.
uselessrobbery.title: too cocky

2x4.name: The House is Structurally Sound Now
2x4.desc: It was sound before, but now it's extra sound!
2x4.title: construction worker

stats.name: Statistics Major
stats.desc: I didn't study statistics, but my calculations point to addiction.
stats.title: statistics major

pixelstreak5.name: Sensei
pixelstreak5.desc: Guess the correct student 5 times in a row.
pixelstreak5.title: relationship level 5

pixelstreak10.name: Addict Sensei
pixelstreak10.desc: Guess the correct student 10 times in a row.
pixelstreak10.title: relationship level 10

pixelstreak25.name: True Sensei
pixelstreak25.desc: Guess the correct student 25 times in a row.
pixelstreak25.title: relationship level MAX

alltasksdone.name: Okay, Maybe a Little Sweat
alltasksdone.desc: Can you do it again tomorrow?
alltasksdone.title: model student
